current_window_vs_nonwindow.definition: current final prompt eplus 511 proxy line from annihilation point to TES energy centroid, transformed to current local side-entry frame; window hit if line intersects x-disc window within r=1.898 cm

old_side_line_blocker.definition: old new_geo_re material on the current v3p5 side-entry axis y=0,z=-5.2 cm, approximated as horizontal side line through the old upright geometry
old_side_line_blocker.old_true_windows: old optical/window stack is axial/top along +z with r=1.898 cm; it is not on this side axis

old_side_line_blocker.dominant_blocker: solid 4.0 cm CsI active-shield side panel, plus outer Al shell/packaging and Cu/W/Al cryostat/passive liners; current v3p5 removes this side material along the optical port by explicit side holes and a W sleeve around an open bore

coordinate_policy.current_panel: current v3p5 local side-entry x-z cm, global coordinates rotated by -45 deg about y
